# Dexploit

> Solana DEX data API: swap streams, OHLCV candles, token intel, wallet
> tagging, pump.fun lifecycle, and a glass-box rug-risk score. Built for
> dApp teams, dashboards, and indexers who'd rather skip the parsing tax.

## Getting started
- [Quickstart](https://docs.dexploit.dev/quickstart): get an API key, first request
- [Authentication](https://docs.dexploit.dev/authentication): pass `?api_key=` or `Authorization: Bearer`
- [Quotas & errors](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/quotas-errors): per-tier RPS, no monthly cap

## Concepts
- [Pairs vs tokens](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/pairs-vs-tokens)
- [Swap-event OHLCV](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/swap-event-ohlcv)
- [Timeframes & resolution](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/timeframes-resolution)
- [Risk score algorithm](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/risk-score)
- [Data coverage](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/coverage): when our index begins + which endpoints carry coverage notes
- [Actor charts](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/actor-charts): time-series of holder count, snipers, insiders, and dev holdings
- [Wallet portfolio](https://docs.dexploit.dev/concepts/wallet-portfolio): holdings sources (Shyft vs basic), cron-free chart model, FIFO PnL, Phase-5 feature flags

## REST endpoints

### OHLCV
- [GET /api/v1/candles](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/api/v1/candles): historical candles
- [GET /api/v1/candles/latest](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/api/v1/candles/latest): newest per timeframe
- [GET /api/v1/pairs](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/api/v1/pairs): liquidity pools
- [GET /api/v1/protocols](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/api/v1/protocols): supported DEXes
- [GET /api/v1/stats](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/api/v1/stats): aggregate platform stats
- [GET /api/v1/top-movers](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/api/v1/top-movers): top gainers/losers per timeframe

### Tokens
- [GET /tokens](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens): paginated token directory
- [GET /tokens/{mint}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}): token metadata + audit
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/audit](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/audit): rug-check audit only
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/intel](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/intel): dashboard summary (actors + top10 + risk)
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/risk](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/risk): glass-box 0-10 risk score
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/holders](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/holders): paginated holders
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/holders/top](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/holders/top): top 20 holders
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/snipers](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/snipers): per-mint snipers
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/insiders](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/insiders): per-mint insiders
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/smart-money](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/smart-money): smart-money wallets holding (paid)
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/whales](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/whales): whale wallets holding (paid)
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/ath](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/ath): all-time-high price + ts + pair (SOL + USD)
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/bundlers](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/bundlers): bundler wallets (stub; ships in Phase 5)
- [GET /tokens/latest](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/latest): newest tokens
- [GET /tokens/multi/all](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/multi/all): newest tokens (alias)
- [GET /tokens/multi/graduating](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/multi/graduating): pump.fun tokens near graduation
- [GET /tokens/multi/graduated](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/multi/graduated): pump.fun tokens that graduated
- [POST /tokens/multi](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/post/tokens/multi): batched lookup (≤20)

### Price
- [GET /price/multi](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/price/multi): batched price lookup (≤100)

### Charts & price history
- [GET /price/history](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/price/history): OHLCV candle series for a token (top pair, configurable resolution)
- [GET /price/history/timestamp](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/price/history/timestamp): single 1m candle at-or-before a Unix-ms timestamp
- [GET /price/history/range](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/price/history/range): aggregated OHLCV over [from, to]
- [GET /chart/{token}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/chart/{token}): chart-ready candles with optional per-row market_cap_sol

### Time-series charts
- [GET /holders/chart/{token}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/holders/chart/{token}): holder-count time series (1h/6h/1d, event-driven, ~3-5s freshness)
- [GET /snipers/chart/{token}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/snipers/chart/{token}): sniper wallet count over time
- [GET /insiders/chart/{token}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/insiders/chart/{token}): insider wallet count over time
- [GET /bundlers/chart/{token}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/bundlers/chart/{token}): bundler wallet count over time (stub; all values 0 until Phase 5)
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/actor-chart](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/actor-chart): combined actor chart — holders, snipers, insiders, dev in one call

### Discovery
- [POST /screener](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/post/screener): Phase-7 V2 screener — ~40 filter fields, full/compact rows, warnings[], x-cache + x-total-matches-exact headers
- [GET /search](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/search): flat query-string alias over POST /screener (edge ACL pending → currently 404 at edge)
- [GET /exchange-traders](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/exchange-traders): known CEX wallets ({wallet,label}) + full count
- [GET /bot-traders](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/bot-traders): bot-tagger wallets ({wallet,swaps_1h,mints_1h}) + full count
- [GET /trending](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/trending): per-window trending ranking

### Wallet intel
- [GET /wallets/{wallet}/tags](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{wallet}/tags): wallet classification
- [GET /tokens/{mint}/wallet-tag-counts](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/tokens/{mint}/wallet-tag-counts): per-tag holder counts
- [GET /deployer/{wallet}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/deployer/{wallet}): mints deployed by a wallet (newest first; carries coverage_note)

### Wallet portfolio
- [GET /wallets/{w}/holdings](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{w}/holdings): on-chain holdings (Shyft) + USD + FIFO cost-basis overlay; degrades to fifo_fallback on Shyft error
- [GET /wallets/{w}/holdings/basic](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{w}/holdings/basic): fast FIFO-derived holdings from Dexploit's own swap index only (~30 ms, uncached)
- [GET /wallets/{w}/trades](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{w}/trades): cursor-paginated trade history, newest first, with per-trade pnl_delta_sol
- [GET /wallets/{w}/chart](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{w}/chart): daily portfolio value series; closed days immutable, today always live with provisional:true
- [GET /wallets/{w}/pnl/basic](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{w}/pnl/basic): FIFO realized + unrealized PnL; always includes warning pointing to Phase 8 for full PnL
- [GET /wallets/{w}/sol-balance](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{w}/sol-balance): native SOL balance + USD via Pyth; null on Shyft error, never 5xx
- [GET /wallets/{w}/stats](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/wallets/{w}/stats): best/worst trade, win-rate, total volume over a configurable window

### Wallet PnL (v2)
Phase-8 cost-basis engine. `pnl_mode=raw|strict|adjusted` (default adjusted). All `*_sol` are SOL; `avg_cost_per_token`/spot price are lamports per atomic unit; PnL timestamps are epoch ms. Code-live on the wallet-pnl service; `/v2/pnl/*` needs the OVH HAProxy edge ACL to resolve on api.dexploit.dev.
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}): cost-basis summary — realized + read-time-spot unrealized SOL, open/closed counts, USD, compact positions
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/positions](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/positions): paginated positions (status/mint/min_value_sol/sort, breakdown=1)
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/tokens/{token}](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/tokens/{token}): single position, always glass-box (breakdown + tags); position:null when none
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/history](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/history): compute-on-read daily series (one point per active day)
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/chart](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/chart): chart-shaped series + summary header (read-time-spot unrealized reconciles with /v2)
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/performance](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/performance): streaks, headline realized drawdown + secondary equity drawdown, best/worst day
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/highlights](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/highlights): biggest winner/loser, fastest flip, longest hold, most traded, biggest single buy/sell
- [GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/risk](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/risk): value-weighted concentration (top1/3/5, HHI) + exposure over priced open positions (mode-independent)
- [GET /v2/pnl/tokens/{token}/first-buyers](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/tokens/{token}/first-buyers): earliest buyers; enrich=1 attaches each buyer's current PnL
- [GET /v2/pnl/tokens/{token}/traders](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/tokens/{token}/traders): traders ranked by realized PnL (breakdown + is_kol; platform/dex accepted-but-ignored → warnings)
- [POST /v2/pnl/positions/batch](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/post/v2/pnl/positions/batch): batch (wallet,mint) pairs (1..200, order-aligned, uncached)
- [POST /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/positions/batch](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/post/v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet}/positions/batch): one wallet across many mints (1..100, null for missing)
- [POST /v2/pnl/tokens/{token}/positions/batch](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/post/v2/pnl/tokens/{token}/positions/batch): one token across many wallets (1..200, wallet-keyed rows)
- [POST /v2/pnl/wallets/batch](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/post/v2/pnl/wallets/batch): per-wallet summaries byte-identical to GET /v2/pnl/wallets/{wallet} (1..100)

### Leaderboards & KOLs
- [GET /v2/pnl/leaderboard/top](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/leaderboard/top): top wallets by realized PnL over period=1d|7d|30d|90d (exclude_arbitrage default true)
- [GET /v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols): all-time KOL realized-PnL board (+ twitter_handle/display_name; exclude_arbitrage default false)
- [GET /v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols/period](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols/period): KOL board filtered to a window, ranked by all-time realized
- [GET /v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols/calendar](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols/calendar): realized-only heatmap (top-N KOL rows × days; range ≤90d)
- [GET /v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols/date](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/v2/pnl/leaderboard/kols/date): top KOLs by realized on one UTC day (win_rate/trade_count omitted)

### Pump lifecycle
- [GET /pump-lifecycle](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/pump-lifecycle): lifecycle event stream

### Account
- [GET /credits](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/credits): RPS-tier usage snapshot
- [GET /subscription](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/openapi/get/subscription): subscription status (JWT)

## Streaming
- [WebSocket: swaps](https://docs.dexploit.dev/streaming/websocket): per-swap firehose
- [WebSocket: OHLCV](https://docs.dexploit.dev/streaming/ohlcv): live candle updates
- [WebSocket: pump lifecycle](https://docs.dexploit.dev/streaming/pump-lifecycle): mint/graduation events
- [gRPC: PriceStream](https://docs.dexploit.dev/streaming/grpc): protocol price feed
- [gRPC: SwapStream](https://docs.dexploit.dev/streaming/grpc-swaps): streaming swap feed with server-side filtering

## Optional
- [GraphQL playground](https://docs.dexploit.dev/api-reference/graphql)
- [Examples repo](https://github.com/DexploitV1/Dexploit-Examples)
